title: Meenkunnu Beach
tagline: Meenkunnu Beach — beach town of Kerala

overview.short: Azhikode is a coastal town and suburb of Kannur city in Kannur district of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Azhikode is a coastal town and suburb of Kannur city in Kannur district of Kerala, India. Azhikode town is divided into Azhikode North and Azhikode South. The northern end of the Azhikode North is called Azhikkal. The place is the birthplace of Sukumar Azhikode, an influential thinker and literary critic.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Valapattanam River
topPlaces.description: The Valapattanam River is a 110 km long river which flows through the Kannur district in North Kerala. It is the longest river in the Kannur district.

topPlaces.name: Kalarivathukkal Temple
topPlaces.description: Kalarivathukkal Bhagavathy Temple, Bhadrakali Shrine located near Valapattanam river. The deity of the shrine is the fierce form of Bhadrakali.

topPlaces.name: Kannur North
topPlaces.description: Kannur North is a suburb of Kannur city in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Talap
topPlaces.description: Talap is a suburb of Kannur on NH 66 in Kerala in southern India. Talap is the nearest town in Kannur district.

topPlaces.name: Pappinisseri
topPlaces.description: Pappinisseri is a census town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Pappinissery have consistently won the Swaraj Trophy for best Grama Panchayat from 2017-2018 to 2021.

topPlaces.name: Pallikunnu
topPlaces.description: Pallikkunnu is a small township in Kannur, Kerala state, in South India. It is in Kannur corporation, on the National Highway between Kannur and Taliparamba.

topPlaces.name: Valapattanam
topPlaces.description: Valapattanam is a census town and a suburb of Kannur city in the Kannur district, located in the Indian state of Kerala. It is also the smallest panchayat in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kannur Beach
topPlaces.description: Kannur Beach is a group of five beaches on the western side of Kannur city in Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Meenkunnu Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Meenkunnu Beach is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Meenkunnu Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (118 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Meenkunnu Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Meenkunnu Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Meenkunnu Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Meenkunnu Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Meenkunnu Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Valapattanam River, Kalarivathukkal Temple, Kannur North, Talap, Pappinisseri.
